stemHtml: Which of the following statements about alcohol is true?

options.a: Men metabolise alcohol quicker than women due to their higher body mass.
options.b: Alcohol effects disappears completely when a pilot does not drink alcohol for more than 3 days.
options.c: An average person of 75 kg will assimilate alcohol with a rate of 0.015% per hour, which is a 0.2 liter beer.
options.d: Tolerance to alcohol depends on the amount of food in the digestive system.
